_note: Account connection status registry. Never store tokens, passwords, or secrets here.
_security: All credentials live in data/tokens/ (gitignored) or .env (gitignored). This file only tracks status strings.

accounts.name: LinkedIn
accounts.auth_note: Use LinkedIn Data Export (Settings → Data Privacy → Get a copy of your data). No OAuth required.
accounts.notes: Manual export only — CyberCookieOS never automates LinkedIn posting

accounts.name: Etsy
accounts.auth_note: OAuth 2.0. Register app at etsy.com/developers. Store token in data/tokens/etsy.json (gitignored).
accounts.readonly_note: Draft listings only. Publishing any listing requires CEO approval via ORION.

accounts.name: TikTok
accounts.auth_note: TikTok API via developers.tiktok.com. Store token in data/tokens/tiktok.json (gitignored).
accounts.readonly_note: Uploads and scheduling require CEO approval via ORION. Nothing posts automatically.

accounts.name: Google Drive
accounts.auth_note: Google OAuth 2.0 via console.cloud.google.com. Scope: drive.readonly or drive.file.

accounts.name: Gmail
accounts.auth_note: Google OAuth 2.0. Scope: gmail.readonly + gmail.send. SEND requires CEO approval.
accounts.readonly_note: Sending email requires CEO approval. Read-only sync is autonomous.

accounts.name: Google Calendar
accounts.auth_note: Same Google token as Gmail/Drive. Scope: calendar.readonly + calendar.events.

accounts.name: GitHub
accounts.auth_note: GitHub Personal Access Token. Store in data/tokens/github.json (gitignored). Never commit the token.

accounts.name: Canva
accounts.auth_note: Canva API via canva.com/developers. Store token in data/tokens/canva.json (gitignored).

accounts.name: Printify
accounts.auth_note: Printify API Key from printify.com/app/settings/integrations. Store in data/tokens/printify.json.
accounts.readonly_note: Creating and publishing products requires CEO approval.

accounts.name: Printful
accounts.auth_note: Printful API Key from printful.com/dashboard/store. Store in data/tokens/printful.json.

accounts.name: Pinterest
accounts.auth_note: Pinterest API v5 via developers.pinterest.com. Token in data/tokens/pinterest.json.

accounts.name: Shopify
accounts.auth_note: Shopify Admin API key. Store in data/tokens/shopify.json (gitignored).
accounts.readonly_note: All product and order mutations require CEO approval via ORION.
